allow: Bash(awk ' { hash = $1 path = substr\($0, length\($1\)+2\) if \(hash != prev_hash\) { if \(group_has_trash && group_has_main\) { for \(i in trash_files\) { print trash_files[i] } } delete trash_files group_has_trash = 0 group_has_main = 0 prev_hash = hash } if \(path ~ /^\\.\\/.trash\\//\) { trash_files[length\(trash_files\)+1] = path group_has_trash = 1 } else { group_has_main = 1 } } END { if \(group_has_trash && group_has_main\) { for \(i in trash_files\) { print trash_files[i] } } ' wc -l /tmp/trash_dups.txt head -5 /tmp/trash_dups.txt)
Bash(awk '{hash=$1; path=substr\($0,length\($1\)+2\); if\(hash==prev\){if\(prev_path~/trash/\){print prev_path} if\(path~/trash/\){print path}} prev=hash; prev_path=path}')
Bash(awk '$1>1 {total += $1; groups++} END {print "Total files in duplicate groups: " total; print "Duplicate groups: " groups; print "Deletable \(keep one per group\): " total - groups}')
